_note: Baked seasonal allergen calendar for the highlands / Larkmont (~34.0N, -40.0E, 300m). month -> { type: level }, level 0..4 (0 none, 1 low, 2 moderate, 3 high, 4 very high). OFFLINE / no-network fallback so the 'Environment' allergen card is never blank; labeled 'Seasonal calendar' in the UI to distinguish it from live measured pollen. Sources: regional aerobiology pattern for the arid highland edge — olive Mar-May, grasses spring flush Mar-Jun, weeds (ragweed/mugwort/chenopod) late-summer to autumn, tree pollen (cypress/olive) late-winter to spring. Conservative for the arid zone (lower grass than a humid lowland).
